questions.clue: This professor teaches History of Magic.
Dudley thought he had received this many birthday presents.
The first term at Hogwarts starts on this day.
The Dursleys live at this address.
This person first visits Harry and Ron in their train compartment.
Ronan and Bane remark that this planet is bright in the Forbidden Forest that night.
This is the first trap Harry, Ron, and Hermione have to get past under the trap door.
Malfoy uses this spell on Neville to bully him.
Lee Jordan says this Quidditch player is attractive during the match.
Dumbledore gives Gryffindor this many total extra points at the end-of-term feast.
Mrs. Weasley makes Fred, George, and Ron do this chore as punishment for flying the car.
Gilderoy Lockhart lets this type of creature loose on his class.
This was the password to enter the Gryffindor Common Room in Harry's second year.
Fred and George fly this brand of broomstick.
Harry interrupts Uncle Vernon from completing this joke during the dinner party.
This person finds the petrified Colin Creevey.
This is the first spell Harry uses against Malfoy during the dueling club.
This is the name of Aragog's wife.
Immediately after waking up in the Chamber of Secrets, Ginny is most worried about this.
This was Percy Weasley's secret.
Harry is reading this book under the covers at the beginning of Prisoner of Azkaban.
Hermione buys this animal at the magical pet shop.
This professor was the Care of Magical Creatures teacher before Hagrid.
This is the name of the Hippogriff Harry bonds with.
This portrait replaces the Fat Lady as the entrance to Gryffindor Common Room.
Hermione's boggart turns into this during her final Defense Against the Dark Arts exam.
As students, Sirius Black pulls this prank on Snape.
This character is revealed to have stolen the passwords from Neville's bedside table.
Harry and Hermione turn the Time-Turner this many times to go back and save Sirius.
This was James Potter's Animagus form.
Voldemort uses this as nourishment while staying in the Riddle House with Wormtail.
These are the mascots of the Bulgarian National Quidditch Team.
Dennis Creevey is sorted into this Hogwarts house.
Professor Moody says everyone needs this above all else.
This is the order of the participants in the first round of the Triwizard Tournament.
After Harry is saved from Snape and Filch, Moody asks to borrow this object.
This character gives Harry the gillyweed.
This curse was used on Neville Longbottom's parents.
This creature is the answer to the Sphinx's riddle about one you would be unwilling to kiss.
This phrase completes the quote: "...it matters not what someone is born, _________."
This was written in the Howler sent to Aunt Petunia.
This person acted as a witness for Harry during his trial at the Ministry of Magic.
Professor Umbridge forces Harry to write this during his detention.
This character was Ginny's first boyfriend.
Hermione suggests using this spell so Dumbledore's Army can know the time and date of meetings.
Tonks gives Harry this for Christmas.
Harry and Cho go to this place for their Valentine's date.
This centaur becomes the new Divination teacher after Professor Trelawney is sacked.
Harry has his vision during this O.W.L. exam.
This was in the package Sirius gave to Harry.
Narcissa ensures Snape will protect Draco throughout the year by making him do this.
Harry receives this O.W.L. grade in Defense Against the Dark Arts.
This is Harry's witty retort to Snape during their first Defense Against the Dark Arts class.
Dumbledore theorizes that Merope and Tom Riddle Sr. became a couple because of this.
Voldemort stole this item while living at the orphanage as a child.
These are the three most important things to remember when Apparating.
Years earlier, Voldemort requested this position from Dumbledore in his office.
According to Tom Riddle, this is the most powerfully magical number.
This person is revealed to have been placed under the Imperius Curse by Draco Malfoy.
These were Dumbledore's last words.
Albus Dumbledore was already notorious on his first day at Hogwarts because of this family fact.
The Death Eaters recognize Harry during his flight with Hagrid because he does this.
At the wedding, Auntie Muriel reveals this about Ariana Dumbledore.
Besides Dumbledore, this person also drank the potion in the Horcrux cave.
This is the first of the five Principal Exceptions to Gamp's Law of Elemental Transfiguration.
This character destroys the Locket Horcrux.
This is the name of the secret radio show hosted by Lee Jordan.
This is the answer to the Ravenclaw dorm riddle: "Which came first, the phoenix or the flame?"
This is the correct response to: "After all this time?"
This is the final spell Harry uses against Voldemort.

finalJeopardy.clue: According to Gamp's Law of Elemental Transfiguration, the first Principal Exception is this everyday necessity.
